description_long: This object is a cluster of yellow flowers with five broad petals each, arranged atop slender green stems. The flowers are accompanied by several large, rounded green leaves with visible veins, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. The petals are radially arranged around a central cluster of stamens, which are slightly raised and textured. The stems are thin and upright, supporting the flowers above the foliage, and the leaves are mostly basal, spreading out at the base of the plant. The overall structure is delicate, with the flowers forming a loose, natural bouquet. The coloration is primarily yellow for the petals and green for the leaves and stems, with subtle shading to indicate depth and texture.
description: A cluster of yellow, five-petaled flowers with green stems and large, rounded leaves, arranged in a natural bouquet. The petals are radially arranged around prominent central stamens.
description_view_0: Several yellow flowers with five petals each are visible, with large green leaves at the base and stems supporting the blooms upright.
description_view_1: This view highlights the vertical arrangement of the stems and the spread of the leaves, with the flowers appearing more clustered together.
description_view_2: The flowers are seen from a slightly lower angle, showing the underside of some petals and the overlapping leaves at the base.
description_view_3: The cluster of flowers is viewed from the side, emphasizing the radial arrangement of the petals and the broad, rounded leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each flower displaying five broad, evenly spaced petals radiating symmetrically around a central cluster of stamens. The petals do not overlap significantly and are separated, forming a star-like pattern typical of many dicotyledonous flowers.
